labels.skipTlsDescription: Allow connections to Transmission instances that use self-signed or otherwise untrusted certificates.
labels.localFilesystemDescription: Enable if qui-Transmission can access this instance's download paths (required for hardlink detection in automations).

validation.apiKeyRequired: API key is required for API key authentication

speedLimits.scheduleAltLimits: Schedule the use of alternative rate limits

validation.downloadLimit: Global download rate limit must be greater than 0 or disabled
validation.uploadLimit: Global upload rate limit must be greater than 0 or disabled
validation.altDownloadLimit: Alternative download rate limit must be greater than 0 or disabled
validation.altUploadLimit: Alternative upload rate limit must be greater than 0 or disabled

queueManagement.enableQueueingDescription: Limit the number of active torrents

validation.maxActiveDownloads: Maximum active downloads must be greater than -1
validation.maxActiveUploads: Maximum active uploads must be greater than -1
validation.maxActiveTorrents: Maximum active torrents must be greater than -1

fileManagement.relocateOnCategoryChangeDescription: Relocate torrent when its category changes (disable to switch to Manual Mode instead)
fileManagement.relocateOnDefaultSavePath: Relocate on Default Save Path Change
fileManagement.relocateOnDefaultSavePathDescription: Relocate affected torrents when default save path changes (disable to switch to Manual Mode instead)
fileManagement.relocateOnCategorySavePath: Relocate on Category Save Path Change
fileManagement.relocateOnCategorySavePathDescription: Relocate affected torrents when category save path changes (disable to switch to Manual Mode instead)
fileManagement.enableSubcategoriesDescription: Allow creating nested categories using slash separator (e.g., Movies/4K)
fileManagement.startTorrentsPausedDescription: New torrents start in paused state
fileManagement.useTempPathDescription: Download to temporary path before moving to final location
fileManagement.tempDownloadPathDescription: Directory where torrents are downloaded before moving to save path
fileManagement.defaultContentLayoutDescription: How torrent files are organized within the save directory
fileManagement.runExternalProgramDescription: Run a command when a torrent finishes. Some instances also support running on torrent added. Transmission will expand placeholders like %N.
fileManagement.runOnTorrentAddedDescription: Triggered right after a torrent is added to the client
fileManagement.autorunProgramTip: Tip: wrap placeholders in quotes, e.g. "%N", to preserve spaces.
fileManagement.autorunUnsupported: Requires Transmission 4.5.0+ (Web API {{minimum}}+). This instance reports {{version}}.

watchFolders.title: Watch Folders
watchFolders.description: Add one or more monitored folders and choose where discovered torrents should be saved.

toast.error: Failed to update file management settings

seedingLimits.enableShareRatioLimitDescription: Stop seeding when ratio is reached
seedingLimits.maxShareRatioDescription: Stop seeding at this upload/download ratio
seedingLimits.maxSeedingTimeDescription: Stop seeding after this many minutes

connectionSettings.versionWarningDescription: We couldn't confirm this instance's Transmission build details, so all connection options are visible. Double-check applicability before applying changes.
connectionSettings.portDescription: Port used for incoming BitTorrent connections
connectionSettings.upnpLeaseDurationDescription: Duration in minutes for UPnP lease (0 for permanent, libtorrent 2.x only)
connectionSettings.useRandomPort: Use random port on each startup
connectionSettings.useRandomPortDescription: Randomly select a port when Transmission starts
connectionSettings.enableUpnpDescription: Automatically forward port through your router
connectionSettings.protocolDescription: Protocol to use for peer connections
connectionSettings.utpTcpMixedModeDescription: How to handle mixed μTP/TCP connections
connectionSettings.networkInterfaceDescription: Currently active network interface. Configuration requires missing API endpoints.
connectionSettings.interfaceIpAddressDescription: IP address of the current interface. Configuration requires missing API endpoints.
connectionSettings.reannounceOnIpChange: Re-announce to trackers when IP address changes
connectionSettings.reannounceOnIpChangeDescription: Automatically re-announce when your IP address changes
connectionSettings.globalMaxUploadSlotsDescription: Maximum upload slots across all torrents
connectionSettings.maxUploadSlotsPerTorrentDescription: Maximum upload slots per individual torrent
connectionSettings.allowMultiConnections: Allow multiple connections from the same IP address
connectionSettings.allowMultiConnectionsDescription: Enable connections from multiple peers behind the same NAT
connectionSettings.outgoingPortsMinDescription: Minimum port for outgoing connections (0 = no limit)
connectionSettings.outgoingPortsMaxDescription: Maximum port for outgoing connections (0 = no limit)
connectionSettings.enableIpFilteringDescription: Filter specific IP addresses from connecting
connectionSettings.ipFilterPathDescription: Path to IP filter file (.dat, .p2p, .p2b formats)
connectionSettings.applyIpFilterToTrackersDescription: Also filter tracker connections based on IP filter rules
connectionSettings.bannedIpsPlaceholder:
Enter IP addresses to ban (one per line):
192.168.1.100
10.0.0.50
2001:db8::1
connectionSettings.bannedIpsDescription: Add IP addresses to permanently ban from connecting (one per line)

validation.listenPort: The port used for incoming connections must be between 0 and 65535
validation.maxConnections: Maximum number of connections limit must be greater than 0 or disabled
validation.maxConnectionsPerTorrent: Maximum number of connections per torrent limit must be greater than 0 or disabled
validation.maxUploadSlots: Global number of upload slots limit must be greater than 0 or disabled
validation.maxUploadSlotsPerTorrent: Maximum number of upload slots per torrent limit must be greater than 0 or disabled
validation.outgoingPortsMin: Outgoing port range minimum must be between 0 and 65535
validation.outgoingPortsMax: Outgoing port range maximum must be between 0 and 65535

networkDiscovery.enableDhtDescription: Distributed Hash Table for finding peers without trackers
networkDiscovery.enablePexDescription: Exchange peer lists with other peers
networkDiscovery.enableLsdDescription: Find peers on your local network
networkDiscovery.announceToAllTiersDescription: Announce to all tracker tiers simultaneously
networkDiscovery.announceToAllTrackers: Always announce to all trackers in a tier
networkDiscovery.announceToAllTrackersDescription: Announce to all trackers in a tier simultaneously
networkDiscovery.encryptionDescription: Protocol encryption helps bypass ISP traffic shaping
networkDiscovery.enableAnonymousModeDescription: Hide your client identification and version
networkDiscovery.resolvePeerCountriesDescription: Show country flags for peers (requires additional bandwidth)

toast.error: Failed to update network discovery settings

advancedNetwork.versionWarningDescription: We couldn't determine this instance's Transmission version, so every advanced setting is displayed. Some options might not apply to your environment.
advancedNetwork.announceIp: IP address reported to trackers (requires restart)
advancedNetwork.announceIpDescription: IP address to announce to trackers (leave empty for auto-detect)
advancedNetwork.limitUtpProtocol: Apply rate limit to μTP protocol
advancedNetwork.limitUtpProtocolDescription: Limit μTP connections to prevent flooding LAN peers
advancedNetwork.limitTcpOverhead: Apply rate limit to transport overhead
advancedNetwork.limitTcpOverheadDescription: Include protocol overhead in rate limiting calculations
advancedNetwork.limitUtpConnections: Apply rate limit to μTP connections
advancedNetwork.limitUtpConnectionsDescription: Apply upload/download limits to μTP connections
advancedNetwork.peerTosDescription: Type of Service byte for peer connections
advancedNetwork.socketBacklogSizeDescription: Number of pending connections in socket backlog
advancedNetwork.requestQueueSizeDescription: Maximum number of queued piece requests
advancedNetwork.sendBufferWatermarkDescription: Upper watermark for socket send buffer
advancedNetwork.sendBufferLowWatermarkDescription: Lower watermark for socket send buffer
advancedNetwork.coalesceReadsWritesDescription: Combine adjacent disk reads and writes for better performance
advancedNetwork.asyncIoThreadsDescription: Number of threads for asynchronous I/O operations
advancedNetwork.filePoolSizeDescription: Maximum number of open file handles in pool
advancedNetwork.diskQueueSizeDescription: Maximum bytes queued for disk I/O
advancedNetwork.checkingMemoryUseDescription: Maximum memory used for piece checking
advancedNetwork.hashingThreadsDescription: Number of threads for piece hash checking
advancedNetwork.diskCacheTtlDescription: How long to keep cached data in memory
advancedNetwork.workingSetLimitDescription: Physical memory working set size limit
advancedNetwork.turnoverIntervalDescription: How often to perform peer turnover
advancedNetwork.blockPrivilegedPortsDescription: Block connections from peers using ports below 1024

validation.checkingMemoryUse: Outstanding memory when checking torrents must be greater than 0 and less than 1024
validation.peerTurnover: Peer turnover must be between 0 and 100
validation.peerTurnoverCutoff: Peer turnover cutoff must be between 0 and 100
validation.peerTurnoverInterval: Peer turnover interval must be greater than or equal to 0 and less than 3600 seconds

toast.error: Failed to update advanced network settings

reannounceWarning.alertTitle: Leave this off unless you need it
reannounceWarning.alertDescription1: This only helps with a small subset of trackers that are slow to register new uploads.
reannounceWarning.alertDescription2: If you are not seeing stalled torrents, do not enable it.
reannounceWarning.dialogDescription1: Use this only if stalled torrents are a real problem on this instance.
reannounceWarning.dialogDescription2: It helps with only a handful of trackers that are slow to register new uploads.
reannounceWarning.dialogDescription3: If torrents are behaving normally, leave it off.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.noAutomations: No automations yet. Add one to start enforcing per-tracker limits.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Rule
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

workflowsOverview.title: Workflows
workflowsOverview.tooltip:
Condition-based automation rules. Actions: speed limits, share limits, pause, resume, delete, tag, and category changes.
Match torrents by tracker, category, tag, ratio, seed time, size, and more.
Cross-seed and hardlink aware—safely delete or move without losing shared files.
workflowsOverview.description: Automate torrent management with conditional rules.
workflowsOverview.noInstancesDescription: No instances configured. Add one in Settings to use this service.
workflowsOverview.clearActivityDescription:
Delete activity history older than the selected period.
This action cannot be undone.
workflowsOverview.filterPlaceholder: Filter by name, hash, or rule...
workflowsOverview.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or clear the filter.
workflowsOverview.eventsWillAppear: Events will appear here when automations delete torrents.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Rule
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

workflowsOverview.enableRuleImmediately: Confirming will enable this rule immediately.

importDialog.title: Import Workflow
importDialog.description: Paste a workflow JSON to import. The workflow will be created disabled and appended to the end.

workflowPreview.loadingPreview: Loading preview. This might take a while...
workflowPreview.neededDescription: These are the torrents that would be removed now to reach your free-space target.
workflowPreview.eligibleDescription: These are all torrents this rule could remove while free space is low.
workflowPreview.name: Name

orphanScanOverview.title: Orphan Scan
orphanScanOverview.noInstancesDescription: No instances configured. Add one in Settings to use this service.
orphanScanOverview.tooltip:
Finds files on disk that are not associated with any torrent in Transmission.
Requires local filesystem access to be enabled for each instance.
orphanScanOverview.description: Scans download directories and identifies orphan files for cleanup.
orphanScanOverview.noLocalAccessTooltip: qui-Transmission and Transmission must run on the same machine. Enable "Local Filesystem Access" in instance settings to use orphan scanning.
orphanScanOverview.scanTruncated: (scan was truncated, more files may exist)
orphanScanOverview.noScansYet: No scans run yet. Click "Scan Now" to find orphan files.

orphanScanPreview.title: Orphan File Preview
orphanScanPreview.description: Review files that are not associated with any torrent before deletion.

orphanScanSettings.scanIntervalTooltip: How often to automatically scan for orphan files when scheduled scanning is enabled.
orphanScanSettings.gracePeriodTooltip: Files modified within this time window will be skipped. Prevents deleting files that are still being written or processed.
orphanScanSettings.maxFilesTooltip: Safety limit on the maximum number of files to process per scan. Prevents accidentally deleting too many files at once.
orphanScanSettings.previewSortTooltip: Controls how orphan preview results are ordered. The Max Files limit is applied after this sorting.
orphanScanSettings.autoCleanupTooltip: When enabled, scheduled scans will automatically delete orphan files without requiring manual confirmation. Manual scans will always show a preview first.
orphanScanSettings.autoCleanupDescription: Automatically delete orphan files after scheduled scans complete
orphanScanSettings.autoDeleteWarningBody: Files flagged as orphans will be deleted automatically without manual review. If dir scan is configured in regular mode, any files in scanned directories that are not matched by a torrent will be flagged as orphans and deleted.
orphanScanSettings.autoDeleteWarningPaths: Ensure your Ignore Paths are correctly configured or use hardlink/reflink mode for dir scan.
orphanScanSettings.autoDeleteAcknowledge: I have reviewed my settings and understand files will be permanently deleted
orphanScanSettings.maxFilesThresholdTooltip: Safety limit: if a scan finds more files than this threshold, it will skip auto-cleanup and require manual review. This catches anomalies like misconfigured ignore paths.
orphanScanSettings.maxFilesThresholdDescription: If more files are found, manual review will be required instead
orphanScanSettings.ignorePathsTooltip: Paths to exclude from scanning. Files in these directories will never be flagged as orphans. Enter one path per line.
orphanScanSettings.ignorePathsDescription: One path per line. Paths are matched as prefixes.

completionOverview.title: Auto-search on completion
completionOverview.noInstancesDescription: No instances configured. Add one in Settings to use this feature.
completionOverview.noActiveInstances: No active instances. Enable an instance in Settings to use this feature.
completionOverview.tooltip: Automatically trigger a cross-seed search when torrents complete downloading. Torrents already tagged cross-seed are skipped.
completionOverview.description: Kick off a cross-seed search the moment a torrent finishes.
completionOverview.failedToLoadSettings: Failed to load settings. Please try refreshing the page.
completionOverview.metadataWarning: Could not load categories and tags from Transmission. You can still type custom values.
completionOverview.indexerWarning: Could not load Torznab indexers. Completion searches will use all available indexers.
completionOverview.noIndexersWarning: No enabled Torznab indexers found. Enable at least one in Settings → Indexers.
completionOverview.bypassTorznabCacheDescription: When on, completion searches for this instance always hit indexers (no cached results). Default off.
completionOverview.searchDelayDescription: Wait this long after a torrent completes before searching trackers. 0 disables the delay. Common values: 5–10s if you use UploadAssistant; 60–120s if files move into place after completion.
completionOverview.selectedCategories: Only {{count}} selected category will be matched.
completionOverview.selectedCategories_plural: Only {{count}} selected categories will be matched.
completionOverview.selectedTags: Only {{count}} selected tag will be matched.
completionOverview.selectedTags_plural: Only {{count}} selected tags will be matched.
completionOverview.allIndexersSearched: All enabled indexers will be searched.
completionOverview.selectedIndexers: Only {{count}} selected indexer will be queried.
completionOverview.selectedIndexers_plural: Only {{count}} selected indexers will be queried.
completionOverview.enableAutoSearchMessage: Enable auto-search to configure filters for this instance.
completionOverview.cannotToggle: Cannot toggle - settings failed to load
completionOverview.cannotSave: Cannot save - settings failed to load

activityRunDialog.dryRunNote: Dry run: no changes were applied.
activityRunDialog.name: Name
activityRunDialog.noTorrents: No torrents recorded for this run.

reannounceOverview.title: Reannounce
reannounceOverview.noInstancesDescription: No instances configured. Add one in Settings to use this service.
reannounceOverview.tooltip:
Transmission doesn't retry failed announces quickly. When a tracker is slow to
register a new upload or returns an error, you may be stuck waiting. qui-Transmission handles
this automatically while never spamming trackers.
reannounceOverview.description: Monitors stalled torrents and reannounces them when no tracker is healthy.
reannounceOverview.confirmEnableImmediately: Confirming will enable this rule immediately.
reannounceOverview.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or clear the filter.
reannounceOverview.eventsWillAppear: Events will appear here when stalled torrents are detected.
reannounceOverview.enableMonitoring: Enable monitoring to start tracking stalled torrents.

form.quickRetryDescription: Use Retry Interval for cooldown instead of 2 minutes
form.quickRetryTooltip: Use the Retry Interval as the cooldown between scans instead of the default 2 minutes. Useful on trackers that are slow to register new uploads. qui-Transmission always waits while a tracker is updating and never spams.
form.monitorAllDescriptionEnabled: If enabled, monitors everything except excluded items.
form.monitorAllDescriptionDisabled: If disabled, only monitors items matching the include rules below.
form.activityEnabled: Real-time log of reannounce attempts and results.
form.activityDisabled: Monitoring is disabled. No new activity will be recorded.

workflowDialog.regexHelp: Go/RE2 does not support Perl features like lookahead (?=), lookbehind (?<=), or negative variants (?!), (?<!).
workflowDialog.addConditionsToPreview: Add conditions to preview impacted torrents.
workflowDialog.confirmSaveAndEnable: Confirming will save and enable this rule.
workflowDialog.noTorrentsCurrentlyMatch: No torrents currently match this rule.

export.title: Export to instance
export.savePathHelp: Parent directory for torrent content. Leave empty to use category default. Supports templates:

priority.title: Torrent Priority
priority.description: Controls the order in which torrents are processed.

tag.title: Tag actions
tag.tagsDerivedDescription: Torrents will be tagged with their tracker name
tag.replaceDescription: Replace mode forces a full client-wide reset of these tags before applying this rule.
tag.managedDescription: Managed mode keeps tags accurate with diff-based updates; Full sync adds tags to matches and removes them from non-matches.
tag.displayNameDescription: Uses friendly names from Tracker Customizations instead of raw domains (e.g., "MyTracker" instead of "tracker.example.com").
tag.multipleActionsHelp: Use multiple tag actions when you need different modes (for example add one tag and remove another in the same workflow).

category.skipIfCrossSeedExists: Skip if cross-seed exists in categories
category.skipHelp: Useful with *arr import queues: prevents automation from moving the torrents if at least one of them are in the *arr import queue.
category.skipDescription: Skips the category change if another torrent pointing at the same on-disk content is already in one of these categories.

externalProgram.loadFailed: Failed to load external programs. Please try again.

delete.keepFilesDisabledReason: Disabled when using Free Space condition. Keep-files mode cannot satisfy a free space target because no disk space is freed.
delete.includeHardlinkedCopiesDescription: Also delete torrents that share the same underlying files via hardlinks. Only includes hardlinks fully inside Transmission; never follows hardlinks outside.
delete.localAccessRequired: Requires "Local Filesystem Access" to be enabled in instance settings.

move.skipIfCrossSeedsDontMatch: Skip if cross-seeds don't match the rule's conditions
move.aboutSkipping: About skipping move if cross-seeds exist
move.skipDescription: Skips the move if there are any other torrents in the same cross-seed group that do not match the rule's conditions. Otherwise, all cross-seeds will be moved, even if not matched by the rule's conditions.

freeSpace.title: Free space source
freeSpace.description: Choose where to read free space from. Default uses Transmission's reported free space. Use "Path on server" to check free space on a specific disk or mount point.
freeSpace.pathSourceWindowsUnsupported: Path on server (not supported on Windows)
freeSpace.pathHelp: Enter the path to check free space on (e.g., a mount point)

errors.unsupportedWindows: Path-based free space source is not supported on Windows.
errors.localAccessRequired: Path-based free space source requires Local Filesystem Access.
errors.pathRequired: Path is required when using "Path on server".

grouping.title: Grouped condition groups
grouping.tooltip: GROUP_SIZE and IS_GROUPED now select a grouping per condition row. Define optional custom groups here for those selectors.
grouping.description: Choose the group directly on each GROUP_SIZE / IS_GROUPED condition row. Built-ins are always available; custom groups below are optional.
grouping.customGroupsTitle: Custom groups (available in grouped condition selectors and action group IDs)

crossSeedContentPath.label: Cross-seed (content path)
crossSeedContentPath.description: Group torrents with the same content path

crossSeedContentSavePath.label: Cross-seed (content + save path)
crossSeedContentSavePath.description: Group torrents with the same content path and save path

releaseItem.label: Release item
releaseItem.description: Group torrents with the same content type and effective name

trackerReleaseItem.label: Tracker release item
trackerReleaseItem.description: Group torrents from the same tracker with the same content type and effective name

hardlinkSignature.label: Hardlink signature
hardlinkSignature.description: Group torrents that share the same physical files via hardlinks (requires local filesystem access)

interval.cooldownDescription: After removing files, qui-Transmission waits ~5 minutes before running Free Space deletes again to allow Transmission to refresh disk free space.

preview.deleteEnabledSummary: This rule will affect {{count}} torrent that currently match.
preview.deleteEnabledSummary_other: This rule will affect {{count}} torrents that currently match.
preview.deleteDisabledSummary: {{count}} torrent would match this rule if enabled.
preview.deleteDisabledSummary_other: {{count}} torrents would match this rule if enabled.

enableDryRunPrompt.title: Enable dry run?
enableDryRunPrompt.description: Dry run simulates all actions without changing anything. You can review affected torrents in the activity log.

customGroup.title: Add custom group
customGroup.description: Combine multiple fields to create a custom grouping strategy
customGroup.groupIdHelp: Unique identifier for this group (alphanumeric, underscores)
customGroup.keysHelp: Torrents with the same combination of these fields will be grouped together
customGroup.ambiguousPolicyHelp: When content path equals save path, how to handle ambiguous cases

dryRun.title: Dry-run results
dryRun.description: Latest run from this editor. No need to leave this dialog.
dryRun.noRows: No dry-run activity rows available yet.
dryRun.detailsUnavailable: Dry-run completed, but activity details are not available yet.
dryRun.noActivityIds: Dry-run completed, but no activity IDs were returned.

summary.tagsChangedBoth: {{added}} would be tagged, {{removed}} would be untagged

toast.targetInstanceMissing: Selected target instance no longer exists
toast.deleteRequiresCondition: Delete requires at least one condition
toast.invalidRegexPatternUnsupported: Invalid regex pattern - Go/RE2 does not support Perl features like lookahead/lookbehind
toast.switchedDeleteModeForFreeSpace: Switched to "Remove with files" because Free Space condition requires actual disk space to be freed
toast.switchedIntervalForFreeSpace: Switched to 5 minute interval because Free Space deletes have a ~5 minute cooldown
toast.pathSourceUnsupportedWindows: Path-based free space source is not supported on Windows. Switched to Transmission default.
toast.switchFreeSpaceSourceDefault: Switch Free space source to Default (Transmission)
toast.enableLocalAccessOrDefault: Enable Local Filesystem Access in instance settings, or use Default (Transmission)
toast.enterPathOrDefault: Enter a path or switch Free space source back to Default (Transmission)
toast.addScoreRule: Add at least one score rule for Score sorting
toast.fieldMultiplierInvalid: Field multiplier must be a valid number
toast.conditionalScoreInvalid: Conditional score must be a valid number
toast.setSpeedLimit: Set at least one speed limit
toast.uploadSpeedInvalid: Upload speed must be greater than 0 (use Unlimited for no limit)
toast.downloadSpeedInvalid: Download speed must be greater than 0 (use Unlimited for no limit)
toast.setShareLimit: Set ratio limit or seeding time
toast.addTagAction: Add at least one tag action
toast.replaceModeRequiresExplicitTags: Replace mode requires explicit tags (disable "Use tracker name as tag")
toast.specifyTagOrTrackerName: Specify at least one tag or enable "Use tracker name"
toast.groupIdInvalid: Group ID must contain only alphanumeric characters and underscores
toast.groupExists: A group with this ID already exists

backups.pageDescription: Manage torrent backups for your instances

selection.selectHeading: Select an instance to manage backups
selection.noInstancesDescription: No Transmission instances configured. Add an instance first to use the backup feature.
selection.checkingDescription: Checking which instances support torrent backups.
selection.chooseDescription: Choose a Transmission instance from the dropdown above to view and manage its backups.
selection.noCompatibleDescription: None of your Transmission instances support torrent backups yet. Upgrade to Transmission 4.5.0+ (Web API 2.8.11+) to enable this feature.

unsupported.title: Backups unavailable for this instance
unsupported.description: Transmission Web API 2.8.11+ (Transmission 4.5.0+) is required to export .torrent files for backups. This instance reports {{version}}, so torrent exports are disabled.

summary.automaticBackupsOff: Automatic backups are turned off for this instance.
summary.enableCadenceToSchedule: Enable at least one automatic cadence to schedule backups.
summary.queuedStartSoon: Backup is queued and will start shortly.
summary.waitingForScheduler: Waiting for the scheduler to pick up the next backup.
summary.waitingForFirstBackup: Waiting for the first backup; scheduler will run ASAP.
summary.schedulerRetry: Should have already run; scheduler will retry automatically.

settings.title: Backup settings
settings.enableBackupsDescription: Turn on automatic backups for this instance. Pick at least one cadence below; leave this off for manual-only backups.
settings.includeCategoriesDescription: Group torrents inside the archive by their category
settings.includeTagsDescription: Store torrent tags in the manifest

schedule.title: Automatic cadences
schedule.description: Hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly runs start after the previous backup finishes and their interval has elapsed. Leave them all off if you only trigger backups manually.
schedule.hourlyDescription: How many hourly snapshots to keep before older ones are pruned.
schedule.hourlyTooltip: Runs roughly once per hour when backups are enabled and at least an hour has passed since the last run.
schedule.dailyDescription: How many daily snapshots to keep before rotation.
schedule.dailyTooltip: Runs about once every 24 hours after the previous job finishes.
schedule.weeklyDescription: How many weekly snapshots to keep before rotation.
schedule.weeklyTooltip: Runs once the last backup is at least seven days old.
schedule.monthlyDescription: How many monthly snapshots to keep before rotation.
schedule.monthlyTooltip: Runs when the previous run is from an earlier calendar month.

actions.requiresCadence: Select at least one cadence (hourly, daily, weekly, or monthly) before saving.
actions.waitForCapabilities: Wait for instance capability checks to finish before saving to all instances.
actions.changesApplyImmediately: Changes apply to future backups as soon as you save.

restore.title: Restore backup
restore.incrementalDescription: Adds missing categories, tags, and torrents without touching existing data.
restore.overwriteDescription: Adds missing items and updates existing categories/torrents to match the snapshot.
restore.completeDescription: Same as overwrite, then removes anything not recorded in the backup.
restore.autoResumeTooltip: When enabled, torrents resume automatically if Transmission reports the restored data as fully checked. In other words; no data is missing.
restore.autoResumeEnabled: Torrents will resume automatically once Transmission reports the restored data as fully checked.
restore.autoResumeDisabled: Auto resume is off. Torrents stay paused until you start them manually.
restore.autoResumeRequiresSkipRecheck: Enable skip recheck to allow automatic resume after verification.
restore.noChangesRequired: No changes are required for this restore mode.

import.title: Import backup
import.description: Upload a backup archive (with torrent files) or manifest.json (metadata only). Archive formats: zip, tar.gz, tar.zst, tar.br, tar.xz, tar.

history.title: Backup history
history.deleteAllDescription: This removes every stored backup archive and manifest for this instance. This action cannot be undone.
history.deleteOneDescription: This will remove the backup archive and manifest from disk. This action cannot be undone.
history.noBackupsOnPage: No backups on this page. Use pagination to go back.
history.noBackupsYet: No backups have been created yet.

manifest.title: Backup manifest
manifest.emptyDescription: Select a backup to view its manifest
